item.title: Avoid Costly Interview Mistakes 💼 • Research industry standards before negotiating. • Practice your negotiation pitch with a friend. • Use: “I am seeking a salary of ₹X based on Y skills.” • Know your minimum acceptable salary to avoid low offers. • Stay calm and confident—first offers are often negotiable. 😌 How will you prepare to negotiate your next job offer effectively? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Avoid Costly Interview Mistakes 💼 • Research industry standards before negotiating. • Practice your negotiation pitch with a friend. • Use: “I am seeking a salary of ₹X based on Y skills.” • Know your minimum acceptable salary to avoid low offers. • Stay calm and confident—first offers are often negotiable. 😌 How will you prepare to negotiate your next job offer effectively? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
